instruction: Help me register the IT asset in the asset ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'IT Asset Registration
Asset ID: IT-2025-00456
Asset Type: Laptop
Brand/Model: ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen11
Serial Number: SN20250312001
Purchase Date: 2025-03-12
Purchase Price: 12800 CNY
Department: R&D Dept
User: Jiang Hao' > /home/user/Desktop/it_asset.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Asset ID'; ws['B1'] = 'Type'; ws['C1'] = 'Brand/Model'; ws['D1'] = 'Serial No'; ws['E1'] = 'Purchase Price(CNY)'; ws['F1'] = 'User'; ws['G1'] = 'Department'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/asset_register.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me register the IT asset in the asset ledger

Fill the asset information from /home/user/Desktop/it_asset.txt into /home/user/Desktop/asset_register.xlsx row 2: A2='IT-2025-00456', B2='Laptop', C2='ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen11', D2='SN20250312001', E2=12800, F2='Jiang Hao', G2='R&D Dept', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/asset_register.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'IT-2025-00456' in s else 'FAILED')"
